subject: Re: dock survey
body:
what is Obrien construction ,, I thought amerlin was r and r

----- Original Message ----
From: "dkiesq@aol.com" <dkiesq@aol.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Sunday, October 29, 2006 10:34:57 AM
Subject: Re: dock survey

As I discussed with Rich the other day.  A big part of my frustration with john and the reason I keep harping on the qustion of john's competence with you is john's repeating pattern of untimely response followed by incomplete, unprofessional, or otherwise faulty workproduct.  Can you tell me why it took 3 weeks to have the survey done and then two weeks or more to get this ridiculously inadequate survey report that I could have prepared in an hour merely from personal observation and some guessing.  John told me that this "survey" cost approx $4200.  This was the person john recommended for the survey job.

Sent from my BlackBerry® wireless handheld

From: "J. Epstein" <jeeproject@yahoo.com>

Subject: dock survey



do we know whehter or not this survey was done at high tide.. or low tide ,, month season daytime?
